rollback_expectations: restore routes.json byte-for-byte if post-add proof remains blocked or contradictory

why_not_combined: combined path broadens rollback domain into secrets/state without current necessity
why_not_local_token: token-only would not populate local route registry or resolve unknown provider naming
why_not_provider_profile: provider/profile fields live inside route payload, not a standalone owner mutation path
why_route_add: routes list and models list both show zero entries from local_routes_registry
route add is the first real mutation surface that can change model registry truth
profile command is read-only and cannot be the next mutation contour
local token creation lives in start --json and is secondary while no routes exist
